old_value: {"id":"smallhold-e5i6","title":"Scheduled posts omit media attachments in federation","description":"In delivery.rs create_scheduled_post() (around line 504-524), the Create{Note} activity built for scheduled posts does not include an 'attachment' field. The main posting path in posting.rs (lines 1155-1217) correctly queries media and includes 'attachment': \u0026ap_attachments. Scheduled posts with attached media will be delivered to remote servers without the media. Fix: query media rows for the post and build the attachment array, same as posting.rs does.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:49.671540502Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:23:49.671540502Z","labels":["codereview"]}
